title: I invest with clarity
subtitle: A two-part energy statement for releasing the belief that investing requires more knowledge or money than you currently have.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 40 of the MONEY program. Two moves: release the idea that investing is too complex or exclusive, then allow clarity and confidence in making investment decisions.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 40 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Investing isn't for others. It's for you."

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 40 of the MONEY program. Two moves: release the story that investing requires more than you have, then allow clarity and confidence to step in.

I release the belief that investing is too complicated for me. I release the idea that I need more money or more knowledge before I can begin. I let go of the story that investing belongs to someone else.
I allow clarity in how I put my money to work. I allow confidence to grow as I learn and start. I invest with clarity.
Read the release statement slowly, then pause. Read the allow statement and let the words land.
Adapted from Day 40 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
